channel.title: Kryptorious Tools Blog
channel.description: Developer workflow automation guides, tutorials, and best practices for Python, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, package metadata, and secrets security.

item.title: I Timed uv Against pip on a Clean Windows CI Box — Here's What's Actually Faster
item.description: Same interpreter, same package, real wall-clock numbers: uv vs pip on a clean Windows host — plus the caveats nobody mentions.

item.title: The 11 Python Developer Tools That Actually Save Time in 2026
item.description: Eleven Python CLIs that cut real work — no fluff.

item.title: Stop Hardcoding Secrets: A Developer's .env Security Checklist
item.description: Detect placeholders, catch leaks, gitignore right, scan CI.

item.title: GitHub Actions CI/CD: The 5-Minute Pipeline That Actually Gates
item.description: A real CI gate + the drop-in Actions that remove the YAML.

item.title: How to Catch Python Package Version Drift Before You Ship
item.description: Version drift between pyproject.toml, __init__.__version__, and your git tag silently breaks installs.

item.title: Python Package Metadata Best Practices (That Actually Get Checked)
item.description: The 7 metadata mistakes that make packages look unmaintained.

item.title: 10 Python CLI Tools Every Developer Should Know in 2026
item.description: From scaffolding to security, these CLI tools will transform your workflow.

item.title: Stop Hardcoding Secrets: A Developer Guide to .env Security
item.description: Catch secrets before they leak with EnvGuard and Secret Scanner.

item.title: From Scaffold to Ship: Automating Your Entire Dev Workflow
item.description: How DevFlow replaces 10+ tools with a handful of commands.
